parameters.formDescription: Fill in the details to generate and send a professional invoice

values.placeholder: e.g. Website Development, Logo Design, SEO Audit
e.g. Payment via UPI: example@upi or Bank Transfer

messageValues.message:
You are a professional invoice generator assistant.

Create a clean, professional invoice email based on the provided details.

Format the invoice EXACTLY like this:

---
INVOICE
---

From: [Business Name]
To: [Client Name]
Date: [Today's date]
Invoice #: INV-[random 4 digit number]

---
SERVICES
---

Description                          Amount
[Service Provided]              INR [Amount]

SUBTOTAL:                       INR [Amount]
TAX (0%):                        INR 0
TOTAL DUE:                      INR [Amount]

---
PAYMENT DETAILS
---

Due Date: [Due Date]
[Additional Notes if provided]

---

Thank you for your business, [Client Name]!
We appreciate your trust and look forward to working with you again.

Warm regards,
[Business Name]

---

Keep it clean, professional and easy to read.
Do not add any extra commentary — only return the invoice text.

parameters.subject: =Invoice from {{ $('Invoice Form').item.json['Your Name / Business Name'] }} — {{ $('Invoice Form').item.json['Service Provided'] }}
=✅ Invoice Sent — {{ $('Invoice Form').item.json['Client Name'] }} | INR {{ $('Invoice Form').item.json['Amount (INR)'] }}
